vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix broken OpenAI tensorizer test
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current RemoteOpenAIServer assumes default model loader which isn't true in tensorizer tests. This PR adds an explicit download_model method to each model loader so that RemoteOpenAIServer can download the model in advance regardless of which model loader is used.
FIX #8249
cc @alexeykondrat

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Use python 3.12 in cuda image
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR updates the PYTHON_VERSION default arg in the cuda dockerfile to 3.12
We suspect this may improve performance, as IBM-built vlm images using python 3.11 instead of 3.10 are faster, and the Python 3.11 release was performance focused, see: https://docs.python.org/3/whatsnew/3.11.html
Python 3

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix async postprocessor in case of preemption
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the bug reported here #8219.
When preemption kicks in, the previous code was running the async postprocessor for all sequences and then retrying the scheduling. However, this introduced a race condition with sequences that were already scheduled due to the possibility of them being alr
